data.title: Amplia Therapeutics Receives FDA Support for Pancreatic Cancer Trial
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

The latest update is out from Amplia Therapeutics ( (AU:ATX) ).

Amplia Therapeutics has received positive feedback from the US FDA regarding its planned Phase 2b/3 trial for narmafotinib, a FAK inhibitor, in combination with gemcitabine and Abraxane for pancreatic cancer. The FDA’s support for the dose comparison design and minimal impact on timelines enhances Amplia’s confidence in proceeding with the trial, which is set to begin in late 2026, potentially strengthening its position in the oncology market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ATX) stock is a Buy with a A$0.42 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Amplia Therapeutics stock, see the AU:ATX Stock Forecast page.

More about Amplia Therapeutics

Amplia Therapeutics Limited is an Australian pharmaceutical company focused on developing Focal Adhesion Kinase (FAK) inhibitors for cancer and fibrosis. The company targets fibrotic cancers such as pancreatic and ovarian cancer, and FAK also plays a role in chronic diseases like idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF).

Average Trading Volume: 1,535,791

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$59M

data.title: Tambourah Metals Launches Advanced Geophysical Survey at Beatty Park Sth
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Tambourah Metals Ltd ( (AU:TMB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tambourah Metals Ltd has initiated a high-resolution Sub-Audio-Magnetic (SAM) geophysical survey at the Beatty Park Sth gold prospect. This survey aims to replace outdated aeromagnetic data and provide detailed insights into the structural elements and potential mineralized zones in the area. By integrating this new geophysical data with existing drill hole and geochemistry datasets, Tambourah Metals plans to generate bedrock targets for future drilling, potentially uncovering new gold deposits in the underexplored Bryah Basin.

More about Tambourah Metals Ltd

Tambourah Metals Ltd operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is involved in identifying and developing gold prospects, with a market focus on enhancing target definition for mineral exploration.

Average Trading Volume: 5,497,812

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$25.1M

data.title: Eagle Mountain Mining Reapplies for Silver Mountain Exploration Permits
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Eagle Mountain Mining Ltd. ( (AU:EM2) ) has shared an update.

Eagle Mountain Mining Ltd has announced that two of its four exploration permits at the Silver Mountain Project in Arizona have been cancelled due to a failure to submit annual renewal applications. The company has reapplied for these permits, and the process is not expected to impact near-term exploration activities, as their immediate focus is on assisting Nittetsu with due diligence for a potential joint venture at the Oracle Ridge Project, and planned activities are outside the affected areas.

More about Eagle Mountain Mining Ltd.

Eagle Mountain Mining Ltd is a copper-gold exploration company focused on the strategic exploration and development of the Wedgetail and Silver Mountain Projects in Arizona, USA. Arizona is a central hub for America’s mining industry and hosts some of the world’s largest copper discoveries.

An update from Anatara Lifesciences Ltd ( (AU:ANR) ) is now available.

Anatara Lifesciences faced challenges in 2025, notably with the GaRP-IBS Phase II trial not meeting its primary efficacy endpoint, although it showed significant symptom improvement. The company is optimistic about the potential commercial viability of GaRP, with forthcoming publications expected to aid in commercial considerations. Additionally, the Anti-Obesity project is progressing, with proof-of-concept studies nearing completion and preliminary findings being encouraging. Anatara continues to explore new opportunities, emphasizing products that address unmet needs, and remains committed to enhancing shareholder value.

More about Anatara Lifesciences Ltd

Anatara Lifesciences Ltd is a biotechnology company focused on developing evidence-based products addressing unmet needs, particularly in the gastrointestinal tract (GIT) sector. The company is expanding its focus across the entire biotech spectrum, with ongoing projects including treatments for irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and anti-obesity medication.

data.title: Helius Medical Technologies Inc. Earnings Call Highlights
data.description:
Helius Medical Technologies Inc ((HSDT)) has held its Q3 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

In the recent earnings call, Helius Medical Technologies Inc. presented a mixed sentiment, highlighting both significant achievements and challenges. The company celebrated successful fundraising efforts and strategic advocacy, which led to increased Solana holdings and positive clinical outcomes for the PoNS device. However, these achievements were overshadowed by substantial financial losses and increased operating expenses, amidst a cooling digital asset treasury market.

Successful $500 Million Fundraising

Solana Company marked a significant milestone by successfully raising over $500 million to support its digital asset treasury strategy. This investment, primarily from Pantera, is noted as the largest cash investment in Pantera’s history, underscoring the confidence in Solana’s strategic direction.

Strong Advocacy and Institutional Adoption

The company has positioned itself as a leader in the digital asset space, processing nearly 80 million transactions daily with minimal fees. Solana’s platform is a frontrunner for stablecoin payments and real-world asset tokenization, offering a native staking yield of over 7%.

Increased Solana Holdings

Solana Company increased its holdings by 100,000 SOL tokens, bringing the total to over 2.3 million tokens. The average gross staking yield achieved was 7.3% APY, outperforming the top 10 largest validators by 36 basis points, showcasing effective asset management.

Launch of ATM Program and Share Buyback

The introduction of an ATM program and a share buyback initiative reflects Solana’s commitment to maximizing shareholder value and enhancing Solana per share growth, providing strategic flexibility in the market.

Positive Clinical Outcomes for PoNS Device

The PoNS stroke registration program study yielded positive clinical outcomes, bolstering the company’s FDA 510(k) submission. This development is a promising step forward for Helius Medical Technologies in the medical device sector.

Significant Net Loss

Despite the achievements, Solana Company reported a net loss of $352.8 million for the third quarter of 2025. This loss was primarily due to a $545.7 million loss on derivative liability and $194.7 million in financing costs from the PIPE transaction.

Unrealized Loss on Digital Assets

The company faced an unrealized loss on digital assets amounting to $30.5 million, attributed to the net change in fair value of these assets, reflecting volatility in the digital asset market.

Increased Operating Expenses

Operating expenses surged to $36 million in 2025, a significant increase from $3.9 million in 2024. This rise was driven by discretionary bonuses and increased SG&A expenses, impacting the company’s financial performance.

Cooling Digital Asset Treasury Market

The digital asset treasury market has entered a phase of execution and consolidation, with higher barriers to entry for new participants. This cooling period follows a rapid expansion phase, affecting the overall market dynamics.

Forward-Looking Guidance

Looking ahead, Solana Company remains focused on its digital asset treasury strategy. The company has successfully raised over $500 million, primarily from Pantera Summer, and increased its SOL holdings. With $124 million in cash and $350.2 million in digital assets, Solana is well-positioned for continued strategic execution despite reporting a total net loss of $352.8 million for the quarter.

In conclusion, the earnings call for Helius Medical Technologies Inc. painted a complex picture of success and challenges. While the company made notable strides in fundraising and strategic initiatives, financial losses and increased expenses posed significant hurdles. The forward-looking guidance suggests a robust financial foundation, positioning Solana for future growth amidst a cooling digital asset market.

data.title: Northern Technologies Q4 Earnings Call: Mixed Signals
data.description:
Northern Technologies International ((NTIC)) has held its Q4 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

During the latest earnings call, Northern Technologies International (NTIC) expressed a mixed sentiment, highlighting both strategic investments and market expansions in China and Brazil, which are expected to yield benefits in fiscal 2026. However, the company also faced significant challenges, including a decrease in sales and profitability, high effective tax rates, and a net loss for the quarter.

Improved Performance in China

NTIC China has shown promising growth, with net sales increasing by 12% in the fourth quarter and 14% for fiscal 2025. This marks the second strongest year of sales in this market, indicating a positive trend and potential for future growth.

New Contract in Brazil

ZERUST Brazil secured a significant new 3-year contract for a major offshore project with a leading global EPC company, valued at approximately USD 13 million. This contract is expected to bolster the company’s presence and revenue in the Brazilian market.

Increased Joint Venture Sales

Joint venture sales for the fourth quarter increased by 4.7% year-over-year, indicating positive trends in some segments. This growth reflects the company’s strategic efforts to enhance its joint venture operations.

Decrease in Total Consolidated Net Sales

Despite some positive developments, NTIC’s total consolidated net sales decreased by 4.4% in the fourth quarter and 1.0% for fiscal 2025. This decline highlights the challenges the company faces in maintaining its overall sales momentum.

Decline in ZERUST Oil and Gas and Natur-Tec Sales

The company reported a significant decrease in ZERUST oil and gas net sales by 29.4% and Natur-Tec net sales by 10% in the fourth quarter. These declines are areas of concern that NTIC will need to address moving forward.

High Effective Tax Rate

NTIC experienced a substantial increase in its effective tax rate, which rose to 67.5% for fiscal 2025, up from 17.3% in the prior year. This increase has impacted the company’s profitability and is a critical area for management to focus on.

Net Loss for Fourth Quarter

The company reported a net loss of $1.1 million for the fiscal 2025 fourth quarter, underscoring the financial challenges NTIC is currently facing.

Forward-Looking Guidance

Looking ahead, NTIC is focused on maintaining stable operating expenses, expanding gross margins, and driving higher-margin sales to improve profitability in fiscal 2026. The company aims to leverage its strategic investments and market expansions to overcome current challenges and enhance its financial performance.

In conclusion, Northern Technologies International’s latest earnings call presented a mixed picture of strategic growth opportunities and significant financial challenges. While the company is making strides in markets like China and Brazil, it faces hurdles such as declining sales in key segments and a high effective tax rate. Moving forward, NTIC’s focus on improving profitability and leveraging new contracts will be crucial for its success.

data.title: KULR Technology Group’s Stellar Q3 2025 Earnings Call
data.description:
KULR Technology Group ((KULR)) has held its Q3 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

KULR Technology Group’s recent earnings call exuded a strong positive sentiment, underscored by record revenue growth and a solid financial position. Despite facing challenges such as a decline in services revenue and one-time impairments, the overall outlook remains optimistic as the company continues to expand and innovate in high-growth markets.

Record Revenue Growth

KULR Technology Group reported approximately $6.9 million in revenue for Q3 2025, marking a remarkable 116% increase year-over-year and a 75% sequential growth from the previous quarter. This impressive growth highlights the company’s successful strategies and robust market demand for its products.

Strong Financial Position

The company maintains a robust financial foundation, boasting approximately $140 million in cash and digital assets and no debt, following the repayment of an $8 million loan. This strong financial position enables KULR to invest in future growth and innovation.

Expansion and Innovation

KULR’s launch of KULR One Air, which quickly expanded to over 150 commercial-ready SKUs, positions the company in the rapidly growing UAV, drone, and electric aviation markets. This strategic move showcases KULR’s commitment to innovation and market expansion.

AI and Telecom Market Entry

The company is entering the AI data center and telecom infrastructure markets with new battery backup units (BBUs) and battery energy storage systems (BESS). This entry is expected to drive significant growth, leveraging KULR’s expertise in energy management solutions.

Texas Headquarters Expansion

Plans are underway to expand the Texas headquarters to over 100,000 square feet by 2026. This expansion aims to increase production capacity to over 50,000 packs per month, supporting KULR’s ambitious growth targets.

Decline in Services Revenue

While product revenue grew by 112%, services revenue saw a significant decline of 74%. This shift indicates a strategic focus on product-driven growth, which may impact service-related revenue streams but aligns with the company’s long-term goals.

One-time Impairments

Due to information from German Bionic, KULR had to take one-time impairments. However, these are not expected to materially affect US commercial sales, suggesting limited long-term impact on the company’s financial health.

Forward-looking Guidance

KULR anticipates a tenfold growth in its energy storage and management business over the next three years, driven by high demand for its KULR One platform, including the recently launched KULR One Air. The Texas-based facility’s expansion is set to significantly boost production capacity, supporting this ambitious growth trajectory. Despite the decline in services revenue, the company’s focus on research, development, and expansion positions it for sustained growth, with a trailing twelve-month revenue record of $16.7 million.

In conclusion, KULR Technology Group’s earnings call reflects a positive outlook, with record revenue growth and a strong financial position paving the way for future expansion and innovation. The company’s strategic focus on product-driven growth and market expansion positions it well for continued success in high-growth markets.
